payload.title: Non-interactive credentials: per-user API keys for CLI & agents
payload.description: Add per-user, named, revocable API keys (hashed at rest, optionally project-scoped) that authenticate the human principal for CLI/agent traffic. The acting-model string is supplied per request, never embedded in the key. Add CLI commands to create/list/revoke keys and wire --model/env so agent calls stamp {principal, acting_model}. Coordinate the on-behalf-of check with SCP-128. (From SCP-122.)
